scripts.bootstrap: npm install && uv sync && uv run pre-commit install && cd apps/api && uv sync && cd ../.. && npm run gen && cd apps/web && npm install && cd ../tui && uv sync
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn api.main:app --app-dir src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev:tui: cd apps/tui && TUI_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -m tui.main
scripts.db:current: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic current
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:revision: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.gen: npm run gen:openapi && npm run gen:py && npm run gen:ts
scripts.gen:openapi: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src uv run python scripts/export_openapi.py ../../packages/contracts/openapi.json && cd ../.. && npx biome format --write packages/contracts/openapi.json
scripts.gen:py: uv tool run openapi-python-client generate --config .openapi-python-client.yaml --path packages/contracts/openapi.json --output-path packages/client-py --overwrite
scripts.format: biome format --write . && uv run ruff format apps packages
scripts.lint: biome check . && uv run ruff check apps packages
scripts.fix: biome check --write . && uv run ruff format apps packages && uv run ruff check apps packages --fix
scripts.test: cd apps/api && uv run pytest && cd ../tui && uv run pytest
